memberdef.argsstring: (ros::NodeHandle &n, int skip_frames, bool show_camera_image, std::string tf_prefix, bool tracker_single_marker, bool tracker_multi_marker, std::string pattern_frame, std::string pattern_file, MARKER_MODE marker_mode, double pattern_width, double threshold, double border_width, int undist_iterations, bool distorted_input, UNDIST_MODE undist_mode, POSE_ESTIMATOR pose_estimation_mode, std::string imageTopic, bool use_multi_marker_lite_detection)
memberdef.name: ARToolKitPlusNode

inbodydescription.para: Sort out marker which are part of multi marker patterns
